# Brix Dude — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> BrixDude is a YouTube channel dedicated to the world of Lego — showcasing creative builds, original ideas, impressive collections, and exciting exhibitions. The channel has a fun, passionate, and community-driven personality centered around the joy of Lego as both a hobby and an art form. It appeals to Lego fans of all ages who love discovering new builds and being inspired by the endless possibilities of the iconic brick.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Dive into a world where Lego creativity knows no limits. From the intricate lego ideas typewriter 21327 to massive original builds, find endless inspiration and connect with a passionate brick-loving community today.

### Channel Highlights
https://example.com/channel-highlights
Explore jaw-dropping Lego builds, rare collections, and exclusive exhibition tours. Witness the lego ideas home alone set in action and discover why every brick tells a story. Click to get inspired now.

### About
https://example.com/about
Discover the face and passion fueling Brix Dude. Learn how a love for sets like the lego ideas typewriter 21327 evolved into a vibrant hub celebrating Lego as art. Join our creative journey today.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Got a Lego collaboration, idea, or just want to talk bricks? Reach out and let&#39;s build something unforgettable together, inspired by icons like the lego ideas home alone set. Message Brix Dude now.

Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Brix Dude
BrixDude is a YouTube channel dedicated to the world of Lego — showcasing creative builds, original ideas, impressive collections, and exciting exhibitions. The channel has a fun, passionate, and community-driven personality centered around the joy of Lego as both a hobby and an art form. It appeals to Lego fans of all ages who love discovering new builds and being inspired by the endless possibilities of the iconic brick.

## Target Audience
- Lego enthusiasts, fans of Lego creations and collections
- Lego Enthusiasts
- Parent-Child Builders
- Creative Tinkerers

## Industry
Content Creation / Entertainment

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
